subject: RE: Weekly Summary of QMS Documents Update 09Mar2026

Hi everyone,

 

Please see below a summary of controlled QMS documents that were created or revised and were approved or became effective in the last week.

 

Please be aware that two (2) new policies (as noted below) have been issued for training by all Abivax staff: (1) Data Integrity Policy and (2) Record Management and Retention Policy. Subject: RE: Weekly Summary of QMS Documents Update 03Mar2026

 

Hi everyone, 

 

See below a summary of controlled QMS documents that were created or revised and were approved or became effective over the last week. As well, please see attached an updated QMS Index showing all currently active Policies, SOPs, WINs and Forms. A copy of this is always stored in PDF and Excel formats on the shared drive here: O:\Commun\Common Activity\ABIVAX Quality Documents\ABX QMS Index and Glossary (QMS Documents moved to Veeva Vault)\QMS Index

 

This communication is sent for your awareness only; there are several documents included here – please ensure you take a moment to review and let me know if you have any questions. As well, please ensure that you are proactively completing training assignment

subject: V3 Availability Poll – [1/2] Master Data Management Workshop
bodyText:
Hello,


Following up on the workshop on organization and governance for effective Master Data Management (MDM).

We have still not been able to secure a common time slot, so this time we are widening the scheduling window to cover a two-week period in order to maximize the chances of finding a date that works for everyone.

To make sure we can finally confirm this session, it is very important that everyone provides their availability in advance. Without enough responses ahead of time, we will unfortunately not be able to lock in a date.

Could you therefore please complete the poll below as soon as possible and make sure to submit your availability at the earliest convenience?


 <https://ow2.res.office365.com/assets/findtime/images/v2/Icon_Calendar_Data_Bar.png> 	Scheduling poll
V3 Availability Poll – [1/2] Master Data Management Workshop
 <https://ow2.res.office365.com/assets/findtime/images/v2/Icon_Clock.png> 	1 hour duration
 <https://ow2.res.office365.com/assets/findtime/images/v2/Icon_Calendar_Clock.png> 	18 time options
	Vote <https://outlook.office.com/findtime/vote?getrequesturl=https%3a%2f%2foutlook.office.com%2fows%2fPUID%3a10032003AF8087FC%40deff24bb-2089-4400-8c8e-f71e680378b2%2fbeta%2fOutlookMeetingPolls%2fGetPollForVotingPage%3fid%3dRgAAAABoPA-hEpQWTZFa1LMrDkjNBwDncSPYulLUQpHZKCLpBhJYAAEfgItvAADncSPYulLUQpHZKCLpBhJYAAF-uId6AAAA0%26authtoken%3deyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Im1VRWhBM25Jdzc4SDA2S2pZRkNNNXhKQzBnVT0iLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJxcHFTbVJDdDNOWXBYRHdwcFFaelBtNXRlR0kifQ..BJM49gTEIoKAhTA2f2jQUYixy2MZiCnys_7YfT5Zvhxc65K7CCAKFoZlgDpdK-HxF5AlqRgWYLOkpKREYrPGC8FP1frdlQeI2rh54iewWir46FaSzt5SAYHEb-a36gCQbEYYrIRbp3BFQqj4S8i9R2U7mFj-m80bDmUnvWYNYY7FtIrx1IDwDBiZhVgpokufhJPEoIVI4qayAlwPBj_MzjBmoDjky_UgkQ2WyYij7q4hGIQiSzEewyqnceWXvj1kX-V4Fav-qZ-zychtdo-aPAMLodxinIZjPD1f6o71qRUteg4N8866wC6y35diFXkNQJnSAANtJFPdi1AIQ9yoBQ&anonymous> 
	View all your polls <https://outlook.office.com/findtime/dashboard> 
	


As a reminder, this workshop will be conducted in two 1-hour sessions. For now, we are focusing on scheduling the first session.

Thank you in advance for your prompt response.

Best regards,

Aymen Ben Alaya

Consultant
Tech Strategy and Transformation / Connected Tech​

KPMG ADVISORY​
Tour Eqho​
2 Avenue Gambetta, La Défense | 92066 Paris La Défense Cedex​

M. +33 7 78 55 33 58
abenalaya@kpmg.fr

 

 

________________________________


L’opinion de KPMG, est que la communication non cryptée par l'intermédiaire de l'Internet ne doit pas être considérée comme sécurisée.
Pour cette raison, la politique de KPMG est que l'utilisation de l'Internet pour échanger des informations confidentielles avec ses clients ne doit pas avoir lieu sauf à leur demande. En échangeant de telles informations, le client s'expose à leur divulgation.
Cet e-mail peut contenir des informations confidentielles à l'attention du destinataire. Toute révélation de cette information est strictement interdite et peut être illégale. Si vous avez reçu cet e-mail par erreur, merci de nous en informer immédiatement et supprimez-le.

In KPMG's opinion, non-encrypted communication via the Internet is not to be considered secure.
For that reason, it is KPMG's policy that uninvited use of the Internet concerning exchange of confidential information with our clients must no

subject: RE: Abivax ERP - NetSuite Biotech Expert Implementors  Introduction
bodyText:
Hi Michael, Hema 

 

Could we schedule a 30‑minute discussion with Youness during this week to clarify your expectations regarding the Finance PMO role as part of the Netsuite migration project (scope of the role, start date, etc.)?
What would your availabilities be? We can check your calendars and propose a slot that works for us.

PS: I am also working in parallel on the accounting role that would support Trinidad 

 

Best 

Walid, 

 

 

Walid Bouassida (he/him) | Director

 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtqd/176152/1638391647kYjfUIce/blue_tele.jpg>   Mobile | +33 (0)6 47 55 30 52

		
 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtrv/176152/16383923044Wq7ugGv/blue_email.jpg>   Email | wbouassida@cfgi.com <mailto:wbouassida@cfgi.com> 

			
 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtsj/176152/1638393343cFN11PNB/blue_linkedin.png>   LinkedIn <http://go.pardot.com/l/176152/pany-thecorporatefinancegroup-/2pxcwp> 

			

 

CFGI <http://go.pardot.com/l/176152/2024-10-07/2pxcws>  | Partnering with you to address your most important accounting and finance needs

 

 

De : Walid Bouassida 
Envoyé : mercredi 4 mars 2026 10:24
À : Michael Markman <mike.markman@abivax.com>; Hema Keshava <Hema.Keshava@abivax.com>
Cc : Jean-Arnold Coutareau <jacoutareau@cfgi.com>; Angela DePoy <adepoy@cfgi.com>; Erica Devlin <edevlin@cfgi.com>
Objet : RE: Abivax ERP - NetSuite Biotech Expert Implementors Introduction

 

Dear Hema,
Dear Mickael,

In parallel, I would be happy to discuss with you the setup you are considering and anticipate any potential needs or resources that could be supported by additional operational assistance.

We can then determine together the relevant profiles as well as the desired availability.
Happy to discuss this with you.

Best regards,

 

 

 

Walid Bouassida (he/him) | Director

 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtqd/176152/1638391647kYjfUIce/blue_tele.jpg>   Mobile | +33 (0)6 47 55 30 52

		
 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtrv/176152/16383923044Wq7ugGv/blue_email.jpg>   Email | wbouassida@cfgi.com <mailto:wbouassida@cfgi.com> 

			
 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtsj/176152/1638393343cFN11PNB/blue_linkedin.png>   LinkedIn <http://go.pardot.com/l/176152/pany-thecorporatefinancegroup-/2pxcwp> 

			

 

CFGI <http://go.pardot.com/l/176152/2024-10-07/2pxcws>  | Partnering with you to address your most important accounting and finance needs

 

 

De : Angela DePoy <adepoy@cfgi.com <mailto:adepoy@cfgi.com> > 
Envoyé : mardi 3 mars 2026 21:02
À : Michael Markman <mike.markman@abivax.com <mailto:mike.markman@abivax.com> >; Hema Keshava <Hema.Keshava@abivax.com <mailto:Hema.Keshava@abivax.com> >
Cc : Shine Thomas <sthomas@cfgi.com <mailto:sthomas@cfgi.com> >; Kenneth Schatz <kschatz@cfgi.com <mailto:kschatz@cfgi.com> >; Guy Morissette <gmorissette@cfgi.com <mailto:gmorissette@cfgi.com> >; Jean-Arnold Coutareau <jacoutareau@cfgi.com <mailto:jacoutareau@cfgi.com> >; Walid Bouassida <wbouassida@cfgi.com <mailto:wbouassida@cfgi.com> >
Objet : Re: Abivax ERP - NetSuite Biotech Expert Implementors Introduction

 

And, I apologize for a second email - trying to get things out between audit committees today.

 

Would you be able to share the RFP and/or the response you received (fully redacted is perfectly fine — we’re not looking for any dollar amounts or commercial details from NetSuite)?

 

That would help our ERP team tailor their messaging, so it’s actually meaningful and specific to what you’re evaluating and sensitive of your time. I realize Phase I went out before you joined, so I’m not sure how much of that you have access to or are able to share — but anything you can provide would be helpful.

 

Thanks again,

Angela

 

 

Angela DePoy | Partner

 <https://www2.cfgi.com/l/176152/2021-12-01/wjtqd/176152/1638391647kYjfUIce/blue_tele.jpg>   Mobile | (

subject: New SOP/WIN/Template Templates Available for Use
bodyText:
Hi everyone,

 

The SOP, Work Instruction, and Form/Template templates have been updated following functional area/SME feedback and are available for use in Veeva. Please utilize these versions moving forward.

*	Template for SOPs <https://abivax-quality.veevavault.com/ui/?tab-collection=qualitydocs__c#doc_info/993/2/0> 
*	Template for WINs <https://abivax-quality.veevavault.com/ui/?tab-collection=qualitydocs__c#doc_info/994/1/1> 
*	Template for Forms and Templates <https://abivax-quality.veevavault.com/ui/#doc_info/11501/2/0> 

 

We do not intend to revise any existing documents with the purpose of matching these new templates only – we will slowly do this as the need for other edits arise and/or during periodic reviews. 

 

Updates primarily include:

*	Providing clear instructions for template use as well as color-coded text for guidance
*	Adding more information into the headers and references in footers
*	Modifying spacing (using more white space) and font sizes (decreased within tables) to allow for fewer pages
*	Adding more tables within each section and aligning format to allow for increased readability and consistency
*	Adding clarification around types of referenced documents

 

Note: The templates utilize ‘tokens’ which are auto-populated when entered into the Veeva system. An example of a completed document header, when using the updated templates, will look like this:



Please let me know if you have any questions.

Kindly,

 



Malinda MICHO
Manager, Quality Systems

www.abivax.com <http://www.abivax.com/> 

malinda.micho@abivax.com <mailto:malinda.micho@abivax.com>
